testcase.name: test_teacher_dashboard_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403 without auth, got 404 assert 404 in [401, 403] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dashboard_apis.py:106: in test_teacher_dashboard_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403 without auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403 without auth, got 404 E assert 404 in [401, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_contact_teacher_requires_parent_role

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403/422 for non-parent user, got 404 assert 404 in [403, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dashboard_apis.py:239: in test_contact_teacher_requires_parent_role assert response.status_code in [403, 422], f"Expected 403/422 for non-parent user, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403/422 for non-parent user, got 404 E assert 404 in [403, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
